calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SAUL FERSTER FOR PLAINTIFF JOERG WITTENBERG
STEVEN MACDONALD FOR DEFENDANT BILL VALENTINE

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT BILL VALENTINE AND DEFAULTING DEFENDANT THERESA CARRITERO, FORWITH, FOR POSSESSION OF 544 B LOMBARD STREET. WRIT MAY ISSUE WITH A STAY UNTIL 12/1/06. IF DEFENDANT VALENTINE SURRENDERS POSSESSION BY 11PM ON 11/30/06, AND LEAVES PREMISES FREE AND CLEAR OF PERSONS AND PROPERTY(SMALL AMOUNT NOT IN VIOLATION), PLAINTIFF SHALL VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE AGAINST VALENTINE.
EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN FEES AND COSTS.
IF DEFENDANT VALENTINE FAILS TO VACATE, JUDGMENT MAY BE AMENDED TO INCLUDE BACK RENT IN THE SUM OF $4471 AND HOLDOVER RENT FROM 7/1/06 UNTIL AMENDED JUDGMENT FILED @ $35.80 PER DAY.
ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:WILL CHEN ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE (218)
